title: Remove redundant code in generateSpec()
body:
Conditional expression duplicates the
code above, therefore, remove it

Found by Linux Verification Center (linuxtesting.org) with SVACE.

```release-note
None
```

comments.body: Nice find! Thank you for submitting a PR. To get through CI, you'll want to (1) sign your commit (`git commit --amend -s`); (2) add `[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]` to your commit message (or just edit the github description); and (3) add `release-note None` to your github description. See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md).
Thanks for the advice! I tried to fix everything according to the CI pipeline
